calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Trust'S Title To Personal Property(Heggstad Petition)
Off Calendar Jan-22-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Madison Gunn for petitioner Emily Alfreda Powell (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Order Determining Trust's Title to Personal Property.

The Court inquired whether San Francisco County is the proper venue. Ms. Gunn stated that the decedent resided in San Francisco, that the trust property is located in San Francisco, and that petitioner administers the trust from the subject property when present in California.

Based on counsel's representations, the Court found venue proper.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Determining Trust'S Title To Personal Property(Heggstad Petition)
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Continued To Jan-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
